summary: Frontend testing completed for DIY Visa Wizard integration. All 7 test cases PASSED: 1) Homepage loads with search bar and 'How Travito Works' section, 2) Search for 'Japan' scrolls to VISA INTELLIGENCE section, 3) All 3 Visa Option cards appear (Express eVisa, Self Apply, Assisted), 4) 'Apply Now' button on Self Apply card triggers wizard, 5) DIY Visa Wizard modal opens with 5 steps, 6) Navigation through all 5 steps works with Continue/Back buttons, 7) Wizard closes via Done button and X button.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with search bar and 'How Travito Works' section
Search for 'Japan' shows dropdown with country suggestion
Clicking Japan from dropdown scrolls page to VISA INTELLIGENCE section
VISA INTELLIGENCE section displays country-specific info (Visa Type: Visa Required, Processing Time: 5-15 business days, Cost: ₹4,000 - ₹16,000)
3 Visa Option cards appear: Express eVisa (₹7,999), Self Apply (₹4,500), Assisted (₹5,999)
Self Apply card has 'Apply Now' button with data-testid='self-apply-btn'
Clicking 'Apply Now' on Self Apply card opens DIY Visa Wizard modal
DIY Visa Wizard modal shows 'Japan Tourist Visa - DIY Application Guide' header
Wizard displays all 5 steps: Check Requirements, Document Checklist, Form Guidance, Book Appointment, Track Application
Step 1 (Check Requirements) shows eligibility form with citizenship, purpose, entry date, destination fields
Continue button navigates from Step 1 to Step 2
Step 2 (Document Checklist) shows document list with checkboxes
Continue button navigates from Step 2 to Step 3
Step 3 (Form Guidance) shows application form guidance
Continue button navigates from Step 3 to Step 4
Step 4 (Book Appointment) shows VFS Global appointment booking interface
Continue button navigates from Step 4 to Step 5
Step 5 (Track Application) shows timeline and 'You're All Set!' completion message
Back button returns to previous step
Done button on Step 5 closes the wizard modal
X button in modal header closes the wizard modal
critical_code_review_comments: DIYVisaWizard component properly integrated into Seasons.js
showDIYWizard state correctly controls modal visibility
Self Apply button has proper data-testid='self-apply-btn' for testing
Wizard receives country and visaType props from parent component
All 5 wizard steps render correctly with appropriate content
Navigation between steps works smoothly with Continue/Back buttons
Modal closes properly via Done button and X button
context_for_next_testing_agent: DIY Visa Wizard integration verified working. The wizard is triggered by clicking 'Apply Now' on the Self Apply card (data-testid='self-apply-btn') in the VISA INTELLIGENCE section. The wizard has 5 steps: Check Requirements, Document Checklist, Form Guidance, Book Appointment, Track Application. All navigation (Continue, Back, Done, X button) works correctly.

diy_visa_wizard.modal_header: Japan Tourist Visa - DIY Application Guide

steps.title: Check Requirements
steps.content: Eligibility form with citizenship, purpose, entry date, destination

steps.title: Document Checklist
steps.content: Document list with checkboxes and progress bar

steps.title: Book Appointment
steps.content: VFS Global appointment booking with city and date selection

steps.title: Track Application
steps.content: Timeline and completion message with 'Go to Official Application' CTA

navigation.done_button: Works - closes modal on last step
navigation.x_button: Works - closes modal from any step

search_flow.search_input: input[placeholder='Where do you want to go?']
search_flow.dropdown: Shows country suggestions with 'Best Time' indicator
search_flow.auto_scroll: Page scrolls to VISA INTELLIGENCE section after selection
